templates.title: 1-star review — asking for more info
templates.text:
We're truly sorry to hear about your frustrating experience. This isn't the level of service we aim to provide, and we understand how disappointing this must be.

We'd like to look into this and help resolve it. Please message us via t212.cc/ask, and once done, update your review with your case reference number.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 1-star review — customer service
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear about your disappointment with our customer service, {name}.

Our goal is to provide timely and professional support, and that's not the impression we want to leave.

We'd like to review your case and ensure your concerns are addressed. Please update your review with your case reference number, and we'll take it from there.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: App difficult to use
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear that you find the app difficult to use.

This is certainly not the impression we want to leave you with, and we'd love to understand what you're struggling with. Please share more details either via the t212.cc/ask form or by updating your review. We're here to help, and we'd love the chance to improve your experience.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Empty review
templates.text:
We're sorry to see your 1-star review, {name}.

We value the feedback of all of our clients and would like to learn more from you. Could you please share more details by updating the review? If this is about a specific trade or instrument, please message us via the t212.cc/ask form and update your review with the reference number. We'll be happy to address all of your concerns and improve your experience.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 1-star review about the ads
templates.text: We're sorry to hear about your disappointment. We never want our commercials to feel intrusive or leave a negative impression. We'll take your feedback into account as we continue refining how we advertise our services. If you have any other suggestions, especially on how we can improve your experience, we'd be happy to hear them.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 1-star review about the free share value
templates.text:
We regret to see your 1-star review.

As outlined in the official terms of the Invite-a-Friend campaign and all promotional materials, each client receives a randomly assigned free share, with the value ranging from 8 GBP to 100 GBP. You can find details on share value probability and other information in the Invite-a-Friend dashboard (Menu → Get free shares). We understand your frustration and we'll look for ways to improve our promotional materials. In the meantime, if we can do something to improve your experience, please share it with us by updating your review.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 1-star review about the customer service
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear about your disappointment.

Our goal is to deliver timely and professional support to all our clients, and that's certainly not the impression we want to leave you with.

Since we understand the frustration, we'd like to review your case and ensure all concerns are addressed properly. Please share your case reference number by updating the review, and we'll do our best to make things right.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 6-digit passcode
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear this has been inconvenient.

The six-digit passcode was introduced to strengthen account security. We don't set the passcode — each client chooses their own combination.

If you have Face ID or Touch ID enabled, you can use it for quicker access. You can also adjust how often the passcode is required via Menu → Privacy & security → Passcode lock.

If you have additional feedback or need help logging in, please contact us via t212.cc/ask, and once submitted, share your case reference number.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Invalid credentials
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear you're having difficulties. The "Invalid credentials" error can occur if you're using autofill or a similar feature. Please try manually entering your email and password.

If you still can't access your account (or you can't register), please email us at info@trading212.com, and we'll assist.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: App crash / bug
templates.text:
At the moment, the app is performing as expected and we haven't received similar reports. If reinstalling doesn't resolve the issue, please message us via t212.cc/ask.

Once submitted, update your review with your case reference number and we'll investigate thoroughly.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 4-star review — can't log out
templates.text:
Thank you for leaving us a review!

You can locate the log out option by selecting the main menu (three horizontal lines). The relevant icon is depicted as an arrow pointing right coming out of a circle. If you need further support, our team is available 24/7 via the in-app chat or the t212.cc/ask form.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 4-star review — something's missing
templates.text:
Thank you for the positive feedback.

We're happy that you find the app safe and user-friendly. Adding more features and constantly upgrading is something that we're dedicated to. Since we value the feedback of all clients, can you please provide us with more on what is missing and how we can earn a 5-star rating? If you have any ideas or instrument suggestions, we'll be happy to hear them.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 6-digit passcode (extended version)
templates.text:
We regret to hear about your disappointment.

We understand that an extra step can feel inconvenient, but the six-digit passcode was introduced to strengthen the security of all our clients' accounts. We don't determine what the passcode should be — each client is free to choose their own combination. If you have Face ID or Touch ID enabled, you can use it for quicker access. You can also adjust how often the passcode is required based on your preferences by going to Menu → Privacy & security → Passcode lock.

If you have any additional feedback or need help logging in, please contact us via the t212.cc/ask form and share the reference number once done. We'd love the opportunity to help and improve your experience.
templates.notes: Longer version — more empathetic tone with reference number request
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: App update — don't like it
templates.text: Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We're sorry if the recent design changes have caused any inconvenience. Each update is intended to enhance the app's performance and overall user experience, and we value all of our clients' feedback. If there's anything in particular we can do to improve your experience, we'd love to hear it.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: App crash (extended version)
templates.text: We regret to hear that you're having difficulties with the app. If you're using the latest app version and reinstalling it doesn't resolve this, please send us an email to info@trading212.com. That way, we can take a closer look at what may be causing the app to crash on your end and assist you with creating a Cash ISA. Alternatively, you can try signing up on a personal computer.
templates.notes: Specifically mentions Cash ISA signup issue — adjust last sentence if the context is different
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Charts — discrepancy
templates.text:
Thank you for your honest and thorough review!

We're happy to hear you're satisfied with several aspects of the platform, including our spreads and the ISAs.

We understand your concerns regarding the chart inconsistencies and P&L delays, and we're sorry for the frustration this has caused. While some differences between platforms can result from data aggregation methods, what you've described doesn't match the level of clarity and consistency we aim to provide. We'll ensure your comments are shared with the team, and we'll continue to explore improvements in both chart reliability and performance feedback tools.

In the meantime, if you're open to it, please send more details and, if possible, screenshots via the t212.cc/ask form. Once you have a reference number, share it with us by updating the review. We'd love the opportunity to improve your experience.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Confusing app
templates.text:
We're sorry the platform hasn't felt intuitive for you.

We'd really appreciate understanding what felt most confusing — whether it's navigation, finding specific features, or something else entirely. Please update your review with a couple of examples so we can better understand and improve the experience.

If you need any guidance in the meantime, feel free to reach out via the in-app chat or at info@trading212.com.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Android widget request
templates.text: Thanks for your review! We understand how Android widgets could make it quicker and easier to keep track of your account at a glance. It's definitely something we're considering, but we can't provide an ETA just yet. We appreciate the suggestion and will share updates as soon as there's news.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: PC log-in / trusted device
templates.text:
There's an important difference between a standard login and marking a browser as a "trusted device". A standard login uses your password plus a verification code (2FA), while "trusting" a device is a convenience option that reduces how often 2FA is requested on that browser. Because trusted status removes an extra security step for future logins, we need to be sure it's really you approving it, which is why a selfie/video check may be required.

If your PC doesn't have a webcam (or it's disabled), you can still use the platform via the standard login flow — you'll just be asked for 2FA more often. If you'd like, contact us via the in-app chat or at info@trading212.com and we'll guide you through the available options.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: App security (2FA mandatory)
templates.text:
Thank you for sharing your feedback.

As an FCA-regulated investment broker, we take security seriously, which is why two-factor authentication (2FA) is mandatory for all clients. We offer two setup methods: via a trusted device or via an authenticator app. For extra protection, you can also enable passcode lock or biometrics.

We understand the need for strong safeguards, so we'll also review session timeouts and related protections as we continue refining security. If you have other suggestions or concerns, please share them by updating your review.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: GDPR / personal data protection
templates.text:
We're sorry you're feeling disappointed.

As part of our regulatory requirements, we must verify each client's identity. That's why we request verification documents and a selfie during onboarding. If the selfie is unclear or low quality (e.g., the face isn't clearly visible), it may be rejected.

We're currently reviewing your submission and will contact you via email with more details.

All personal data you provide is handled confidentially and in line with GDPR requirements. We don't share your information with third parties.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Verification — why it's needed
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear that the verification process has been so frustrating.

As a licensed and regulated investment broker, we must comply with strict identity verification requirements. Document acceptance can vary depending on factors such as country of residence, document type, and nationality.

We'd like to take a second look and help you complete verification. Please message us via t212.cc/ask, and once done, share your case reference number.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: SOF / SOW (Source of Funds / Source of Wealth)
templates.text:
We may occasionally request additional details about your source of wealth, source of funds, and other relevant information as part of our regulatory due diligence. These checks help ensure account activity aligns with the anti-money laundering (AML) policies we follow and supports a secure, compliant environment.

All information you provide is handled confidentially and in line with GDPR requirements.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Payment method verification (withdrawal limits)
templates.text:
You can withdraw your funds at any time. However, if not all payment methods have been verified, withdrawal limits may apply depending on your deposits.

Payment method verification is required under anti-money laundering regulations. If you've added multiple payment methods, all of them must be verified. Even if a method is no longer active, we can't remove it — only verify it.

If you need help with verification, please message us and we'll assist.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Identity fraud (documents not yours / account termination)
templates.text:
We wouldn't terminate an account without a valid reason. Uploading documents belonging to another person is strictly prohibited. We don't offer joint accounts, and accounts must only be operated by the account holder.

If you're having trouble creating an account using your own documents, please contact us in the active conversation (or via t212.cc/ask) and we'll help.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Scam (someone pretending to be Trading 212)
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear about your experience and that you may have been targeted by a scam.

As a regulated broker, we will never ask clients for money or contact them by phone. Official communication takes place only via in-app chat or our verified email addresses ending in @trading212.com. We are not affiliated with external platforms or third parties.

If you believe you've been approached by a fraudulent party, please contact us via t212.cc/ask so we can help verify the situation and guide you on next steps. Once submitted, please update your review with your case reference number and we'll assist.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Vulnerable client — trading break(s)
templates.text:
We're sorry to see your 1-star review.

As an FCA-regulated investment broker, we have a safety measure designed to protect clients and address potential financial vulnerability, in line with our Consumer Duty obligations. If certain financial details don't align with account activity, the system may notify you and this can also lead to trading breaks. If a trading break is applied, we'll inform you when it's placed and when it's lifted.

We understand how frustrating this can be, and we'd like to review your case. Please update your review with your case reference number and we'll take a closer look.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 212 is scam, etc.
templates.text:
We're very sorry to hear about your experience.

As an FCA regulated broker, we're obliged to comply with regulations, which is why we'll request specific documents for verification, source of wealth, etc. Due to an increased volume of requests that we're dealing with, this can cause a delay in our response. We're working on addressing this by improving our team and operations. For your case specifically, please provide us with the reference number by updating your review. We'll make sure to get back to you.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 2FA — now mandatory
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear about your case and we understand how frustrating this can be.

The Two-factor authentication is now mandatory for all clients to ensure there's extra security applied. When you're enabling it for the first time, we'll ask you for a selfie and photo/s of an ID document (driving license or passport). We checked your case and contacted you in the open conversation. If you require assistance with anything else, please let us know in the live chat or by updating your review.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: SoW before withdrawals
templates.text:
We're sorry to see your frustration and would like to provide some clarity.

We are required to follow strict regulations, including conducting due diligence to protect our clients' funds and prevent any fraudulent activity. Consequently, we may request certain documents before processing withdrawals. The required documents may vary depending on the situation. Part of our due diligence process involves verifying the source of funds. This often requires collecting extra documentation and cross-referencing details, which can take some time, but it's essential in helping us ensure we remain compliant. Immediately when we receive all the required documents, you'll be able to withdraw as usual.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Can't sign up (country not supported)
templates.text: We're sorry to see your 1-star review. At the moment, we don't offer our services in Canada, but we're continuously exploring opportunities to expand. If we're able to onboard clients there in the future, we'll make an official announcement.
templates.notes: Adjust country name as needed (e.g. Canada → relevant country)
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Campaigns are only for new clients
templates.text:
Thank you for your feedback, and we're sorry to hear about your disappointment.

We value all of our clients — new and long-standing. Promotions for new clients are common across many industries, but they're never meant to overlook the loyalty of existing clients.

We appreciate your input and will continue looking for ways to provide ongoing value. If there's something specific we can do to improve your experience, please share it by updating your review.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Cash ISA bonus rate
templates.text:
We're sorry to see you feel this way.

Our campaigns have strict eligibility criteria to ensure fairness and consistency for all participants.

For example, to qualify for the 'Cash ISA Promotional Rate', you must be a UK resident with no previous Trading 212 accounts, successfully open and verify a new Cash ISA, use an affiliate link connected explicitly to the campaign, and make a qualifying deposit within 10 days of registering. We cannot grant the bonus rate if one or more criteria are not met.

Our Help Centre article titled 'Cash ISA Bonus rate' outlines all conditions for complete transparency. You can also contact us via the in-app chat or info@trading212.com so we can check your account and provide more information.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Bonus rate for new clients
templates.text: We aim to treat all our clients equally, whether they've just joined or have been with us for a while, and to provide the same level of service, support, and benefits to everyone. While some promotions may be tailored for new customers, this doesn't reflect a lack of appreciation for our existing clients. If there's a promotion available for existing clients, we'll make the appropriate announcements.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Migrating customers (UK entity)
templates.text:
We're sorry for the inconvenience this has caused.

If you created your account a few years ago, we were onboarding all clients to our UK entity at the time, as our EU entity didn't yet exist. Unfortunately, our UK entity can only offer card services to UK residents, which is why you're unable to receive a debit card.

We're currently looking into options for EU clients registered under the UK entity, but we're unable to provide further details at this point. We appreciate your patience and understanding while we work through this.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Multi-currency deposits (Invest)
templates.text: Our Invest account is multi-currency. If the primary currency in your account is GBP and you wish to deposit USD, that's possible. You can choose to deposit in USD when you make it. Additionally, you can adjust the currency for your orders according to your preferences in 'Menu' → 'Settings' → 'Currency options'.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Instant bank transfer — bank not supported
templates.text:
Instant bank transfers are facilitated via TrueLayer, a third-party provider. The list of supported banks is determined by TrueLayer's cooperation with each bank, so it can't be modified by Trading 212.

Even if Co-operative Bank isn't currently supported for instant transfers, you can still deposit via a regular bank transfer (typically 2–3 business days). Our bank details are available in the app via Deposit funds → Bank transfer. You can then complete the transfer directly from your banking app.

If you're having difficulties depositing funds, please let us know by updating your review. We're here to help.
templates.notes: Adjust bank name as needed (e.g. Co-operative Bank → relevant bank)
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Failed deposits
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear that.

The most common reasons for failed deposits are insufficient funds, incorrect details, or an invalid CVC code. We recommend contacting your card issuer first. If they confirm they're not blocking the transaction, please reach out via the in-app chat or at info@trading212.com with any error message and details, so we can investigate.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Instruments are missing
templates.text:
Thank you for sharing your thoughts. We're constantly working on expanding our portfolio, but some instruments may be unavailable due to regulatory requirements or market access limitations.

That said, we're continuing to improve the selection and add as many new options as possible.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Restricted instrument(s)
templates.text:
We don't restrict an instrument without a valid reason — e.g., bankruptcy, compliance restrictions, exchange-initiated suspensions, pending delisting, or regulatory investigations.

For transparency, whenever an instrument is restricted, a trading notice will be displayed.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Max order / position size limits
templates.text:
We understand these limits can be frustrating, and it's never our intention to make things difficult.

Maximum order and position size limits are determined by our risk management framework and current market conditions. They help protect both clients and the platform from unnecessary risk — especially when trading highly volatile or less liquid instruments. That's why limits can be higher for very liquid stocks (e.g., Apple, Nvidia, Tesla) and lower for low-liquidity instruments.

We continuously reassess these limits and factor client feedback into future adjustments.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Price manipulation
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear you feel this way.

As an FCA-regulated broker, we're committed to transparency and compliance. Prices on our platform come from our liquidity providers and reflect real-time market data. While charts are for indicative purposes, we do not manipulate prices.

Small differences across platforms can happen due to differences in data sources or update timing. If you have concerns about a specific instrument or trade, please contact us via t212.cc/ask — we'll be happy to review it.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Exchange suggestion (Google Play short)
templates.text: Thanks for the review — we're glad you're enjoying our services. We're continually expanding our instrument list and adding new exchanges, and we've noted your suggestion. If we add either exchange, we'll notify everyone right away. In the meantime, feel free to share more suggestions with us by updating your review.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Specific order not filled / no info shared
templates.text:
Thank you for sharing your thoughts!

We understand how frustrating it can be when an order doesn't fill, especially if it seems like the target price was reached. All orders are executed in line with our Order Execution Policy to ensure the best possible execution at all times. The execution, however, depends on various factors, including volume and market liquidity at the time. If you're open to it, our team would be happy to review any specific orders. Please reach out to us directly via the t212.cc/ask form and share the reference number once done.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Financial loss
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear about your experience and understand how concerning losses can be.

Investing in financial markets involves risk, including the potential to lose money, so it's essential to make informed decisions that match your financial goals, risk tolerance, and overall financial well-being. We encourage clients to explore educational resources on risk management and, if needed, consult a qualified financial adviser before investing further.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 212 Card — declined transactions
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear about your frustrating experience.

Card declines can happen for several reasons, such as merchant processing errors, lack of 3D Secure support, unsupported ATM transactions, or transactions with blocked merchants. As for prepay petrol stations, the issue often stems from the pump's pre-authorisation process, which can vary by location and provider.

If you're referring to specific declined transactions, please share more details via the t212.cc/ask form. Once done, update your review with the case reference number, and we'll be happy to investigate further.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 212 Card — frozen due to suspicious transactions
templates.text:
We're sorry to hear about your experience and understand how frustrating this situation can be.

Please note that card restrictions aren't applied manually. They are triggered automatically when our system detects activity or transactions that may appear suspicious. In such cases, access to the account or card may be temporarily limited until the necessary verification is completed. While we fully appreciate how inconvenient this may feel, these safeguards are required by regulation and are in place to protect your account.

We've located your case with the details shared in the review, and additional information has already been shared in the ongoing conversations. To resolve this, please complete the verification checks that will appear in the app. Once done, just let us know — we'll be ready to assist you right away.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Spread (Invest/ISA vs CFD)
templates.text:
We're sorry to see your disappointment.

On Invest & ISA, you get the raw market spread with no markup. CFD trading involves risk, and we always encourage everyone to consider their risk tolerance and use risk management tools. On CFDs, the spread is floating and depends on market conditions — periods of low liquidity or high volatility can temporarily widen it.

All orders are executed at the best available price by our system. If you're referring to a specific trade or position, please share more details by updating your review, or contact us via in-app chat so we can take a detailed look and answer your questions.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Card deposits — limit & fees
templates.text: Card deposits remain fee-free until you have deposited 2,000 GBP / 2,000 EUR in total. If the limit is reached, a 0.70% fee will be applied to each card deposit afterwards. A confirmation of the limit and fees will appear each time you attempt to deposit funds with a card. On the other hand, deposits via bank wire remain free of charge regardless of the total amount you have deposited.
templates.notes: Check that deposit limits and fee percentages are still current before using
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Interest on cash — Cash ISA only
templates.text:
Thanks for sharing your thoughts with us.

Our Cash ISA interest rate tracks the Bank of England (BoE) base rate to stay aligned with market conditions. The rate is BoE base rate minus 0.15% (variable tracker rate). Any changes to the base rate will be reflected accordingly.

Example: if the BoE base rate is 4%, your Cash ISA interest rate will be 3.85% AER.

We appreciate your feedback and will keep it in mind as we continue improving. If there's anything else we can do to enhance your experience, please let us know.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Interest on cash — regular rates
templates.text:
Interest rates are based on the rates we receive from banks and QMMFs where we hold client cash. These are influenced by central bank rates. For example, if the European Central Bank changes its base rate, our rate may adjust accordingly.

We appreciate your feedback and will keep it in mind as we continue improving. If there's anything else we can do to make your experience better, please let us know.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: AutoInvest missed the deposit
templates.text:
AutoInvest requires at least half of your 'Investment plan' schedule to pass before processing the next payment. For your case specifically, the pie will need at least 14 days from the day you enable AutoInvest based on your deposit schedule. If not, the scheduled deposit will be skipped.

Even if the scheduled deposit is skipped, you can still deposit funds manually and add them to your pie. On the other hand, if you selected the free funds option, you'll need to have the necessary amount as free funds in your Trading 212 account.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: Reverse Split (Google Play short)
templates.text: Thanks for the review, X — glad you're enjoying Trading 212! Reverse stock splits are corporate actions executed by the company, and we have no control over such decisions. They reduce share count and raise the price proportionally, so your total holding value stays the same. If you have any concerns, please message us via the in-app chat.
templates.notes: Google Play 350-character version. Replace X with reviewer name.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — glad you're satisfied
templates.text:
Thank you for leaving a review!

We're glad you're satisfied with the app. We strive to provide a pleasant user experience, and it's always a pleasure to see such positive feedback.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — continuous improvements
templates.text:
Thank you for your kind review!

We're delighted to hear you're enjoying the app and noticing the continuous improvements. Our goal is to keep enhancing and make the user experience even better.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — great services (v1)
templates.text:
Thank you so much for your kind words!

We're thrilled to hear that you find our app and services great.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — great services (v2)
templates.text:
Thank you so much for your kind words!

We are delighted to hear that you think our services are great.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — met expectations
templates.text:
We're so happy to see your 5-star review!

It's always our goal to provide the best experience possible, and it means a lot to know we've met your expectations.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — smooth experience
templates.text:
Thank you for the 5-star rating!

We're thrilled to hear you had a smooth user experience — that's exactly what we strive for.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — user interface
templates.text:
Thank you for your feedback!

We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the user interface. We work hard to make it as intuitive and user-friendly as possible, so it's great to know it's making a difference for you.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — reliable experience
templates.text:
Thank you for the kind words!

We aim to provide a reliable and enjoyable experience, so it's lovely to know we're delivering that for you.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — glad you're satisfied (short)
templates.text:
Thank you for leaving a review!

We're glad you're satisfied with the app.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — meets expectations
templates.text:
Thank you for your wonderful feedback!

We're thrilled to hear that you're enjoying the app and that it meets your expectations.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — motivated to improve
templates.text:
We're so happy to hear that you're enjoying the app!

Knowing that our clients are satisfied keeps us motivated to improve and innovate.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — positive experience
templates.text:
Thank you for taking the time to leave a review!

We're thrilled to hear about your positive experience.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — right track
templates.text:
Thank you for the kind words and for sharing your experience with us!

It's great to know we're on the right track.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — pleasant UX
templates.text:
Thank you for rating us with 5 stars!

Providing a pleasant user experience is our goal, and receiving such a positive feedback is truly rewarding.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — like app & features
templates.text:
Thank you for the 5-star review!

We're pleased to see you like the app and its features.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — top-notch rating
templates.text:
Thank you for the top-notch rating!

We're delighted to hear that you enjoy the app and its features.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — easy to use
templates.text:
Thank you for sharing your feedback!

We're pleased to see you find the app easy to use.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — industry leader
templates.text:
Thank you for your wonderful feedback!

We're delighted to hear about your overall experience. It's our goal to stay at the forefront of the industry, and receiving such positive feedback is always a pleasure.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — helpful staff & UX
templates.text:
Thank you for your review!

We're glad you're finding the app easy to use and that our staff has been helpful. We strive to provide a seamless user experience and efficient customer support.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — account organisation
templates.text:
Thank you for the positive feedback!

We're glad you appreciate the app's organization and ability to streamline various account types for easier management.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — user-friendly
templates.text:
Thank you for your feedback!

We're glad you find the app user-friendly.
templates.author: Trading 212

templates.title: 5-star — easy to navigate
templates.text:
Thank you for reviewing us!

We're glad to hear you find the app easy to navigate.

templates.title: BoE + Existing Clients Interest
templates.text:
We're sorry to see that our services didn't quite match your expectations.

While some promotions may be tailored for new users, this doesn't reflect a lack of appreciation for our existing users and our ongoing campaigns are never meant to overlook the loyalty of existing users.

The Cash ISA rate we offer tracks the Bank of England (BoE) base rate to stay aligned with market conditions. This means the rate we offer automatically adjusts for everyone when the Bank of England changes its base rate, while the fixed rate secured by joining during a promotional campaign remains the same. Still, we understand your point, and if there's a promotion available for existing users, we'll make the appropriate announcements right away. In the meantime, please let us know if you have any additional feedback by updating your review.
templates.author: Momchil Georgiev
